waypoints.note: Bombarding Force A flagship (Adm Deyo). Pearl Harbor survivor returning to combat ; assigned to Utah and the Saint-Marcouf battery.
Opens fire 05:50 on the Saint-Marcouf battery (Crisbecq) at maximum range with 14-inch main battery.
Continues call-fire support inland through the day ; targets retreating 91. Luftlande / 709. ID concentrations.
